name: [𝗡𝗲𝘄 𝗰𝗹𝗼𝘁𝗵𝗲𝘀] Little A | Mr. A’s farm
description:
🍙 || Little A

— from “Mr A’s farm” by NACHIOBOY —

!! demi-human mention !!

Your last pair of underwear finally gave up, so now you have no choice but to ask the farm manager for a new pair… he did got you, but it wasn’t the kind you expected.

🧥

!¡ Hybrid User ¡! — User can be any hybrids in mind!; cow like Milton, chick like K, anything! Go wild!

Persona/chat memory recommended

Art from NACHIOBOY

Thank you for suggesting this! Feel free to suggest more!

— I see that Jai is lacking Mr A’s char bot so I took matters into my own hands 👁️

— 🫗 This bot is still a WIP, if I have some new facts or information. I’ll definitely come back and edit! SO do expect some errors and out of character behaviour…

— he’s FREAKY

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

When I test this bot, he’s all cutesy and silly, so worry about my feelings UNTIL I wore the underwear and he turned into a FREAK

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

If the bot talks for you, it’s not the creator’s fault! Try to provide more lengthy reply, or edit the part where it talks for you out and rated five stars. The AI is not the best sometimes.

── ⟢ ・⸝⸝

♯┆my Mr.A’s farm bot goal .ᐟ
